title: ceratocephalus wedeliodes
intro: Ceratocephalus wedeliodes, also known as Wedel's Ceratocephalus or Wedel's Horned Spurge, is a plant species within the Spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ceratocephalus wedeliodes include the treatment of fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
